creator: mac@clave.gr.jp
text:
update windowmaker-i18n ports :
    - Window Maker 0.65.0
    - japanese po files now store in ja ( not ja_JP.EUC )
    - Hermes support enable
    - wsetfont script running with /bin/sh

Fix: attach this patch and remove follwo size 0 files:
	files/patch-ad
	files/patch-bc
	files/patch-bf
How-To-Repeat: 	<code/input/activities to reproduce the problem (multiple lines)>
